parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(c.id::text, '') AS id,
  COALESCE(c.status, '') AS status,
  COALESCE(c.message_count, 0) AS message_count,
  COALESCE(c.fastapi_session_id, '') AS fastapi_session_id,
  COALESCE(c.clinic_name, '') AS clinic_name,
  COALESCE(c.remote_jid, '') AS clinic_phone,
  COALESCE(c.paused, false) AS paused,
  c.detected_persona,
  c.persona_confidence,
  c.is_homolog,
  l.place_id,
  l.lead_score,
  l.ads_group
FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
LEFT JOIN gk_conversations c
  ON (
    (NOT {{ $json.isHomolog }} AND c.remote_jid = '{{ $json.remoteJid }}')
    OR
    ({{ $json.isHomolog }} = true)
  )
LEFT JOIN gk_leads l ON l.conversation_id = c.id
ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

WITH register_wamid AS (
  INSERT INTO sdr_debounce (remote_jid, last_wamid, updated_at)
  VALUES ('{{ $json.remoteJid }}', '{{ $json.wamid }}', NOW())
  ON CONFLICT (remote_jid) DO UPDATE
    SET last_wamid = EXCLUDED.last_wamid,
        updated_at = NOW()
),
upsert_conversation AS (
  INSERT INTO gk_conversations (remote_jid, clinic_name, status, message_count, last_message_at, expires_at, is_homolog)
  VALUES (
    '{{ $json.remoteJid }}',
    '{{ $json.clinicName }}',
    'gathering_decisor',
    1,
    NOW(),
    NOW() + INTERVAL '4 hours',
    {{ $json.isHomolog }}
  )
  ON CONFLICT (remote_jid) DO UPDATE
    SET message_count = gk_conversations.message_count + 1,
        last_message_at = NOW(),
        status = CASE
          WHEN gk_conversations.status IN ('stalled', 'expired', 'pending_optout', 'archived') THEN 'gathering_decisor'
          ELSE gk_conversations.status
        END,
        last_reset_at = CASE
          WHEN gk_conversations.status IN ('expired', 'pending_optout', 'archived') THEN NOW()
          ELSE gk_conversations.last_reset_at
        END,
        fastapi_session_id = CASE
          WHEN gk_conversations.status IN ('expired', 'pending_optout', 'archived') THEN NULL
          ELSE gk_conversations.fastapi_session_id
        END,
        expires_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '4 hours'
  RETURNING id, last_reset_at
),
update_lead AS (
  UPDATE gk_leads
  SET status = 'gathering_decisor', updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE conversation_id = (SELECT id FROM upsert_conversation)
    AND status NOT IN ('decisor_captured', 'opted_out', 'closed', 'failed')
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO gk_messages (conversation_id, direction, content, message_type, wamid)
  VALUES (
    (SELECT id FROM upsert_conversation),
    'inbound',
    '{{ ($json.messageContent).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.messageType }}', ''), 'text'),
    '{{ $json.wamid }}'
  )
  RETURNING conversation_id
)
SELECT
  (SELECT id FROM upsert_conversation) AS conversation_id,
  m.direction,
  m.content,
  m.stage,
  m.created_at
FROM upsert_conversation uc
LEFT JOIN gk_messages m ON m.conversation_id = uc.id
  AND m.created_at >= uc.last_reset_at
ORDER BY m.created_at ASC NULLS FIRST
LIMIT 50;

nodes.name: Supabase - Salva Inbound e Busca Histórico

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "clinic_name": {{ JSON.stringify($json.clinicName) }},
  "clinic_phone": {{ JSON.stringify($json.clinicPhone) }},
  "sdr_name": {{ JSON.stringify($json.sdrName || 'Vera') }},
  "conversation_history": {{ JSON.stringify($json.conversationHistory) }},
  "latest_message": {{ JSON.stringify($json.latestMessage) }},
  "current_hour": {{ new Date(new Date().toLocaleString('en-US', { timeZone: 'America/Sao_Paulo' })).getHours() }},
  "current_weekday": {{ (new Date(new Date().toLocaleString('en-US', { timeZone: 'America/Sao_Paulo' })).getDay() + 6) % 7 }},
  "detected_persona": {{ JSON.stringify($json.detectedPersona || null) }},
  "persona_confidence": {{ JSON.stringify($json.personaConfidence || null) }},
  "is_homolog": {{ $json.isHomolog || false }},
  "current_status": {{ JSON.stringify($json.currentStatus || null) }}
}

parameters.query:
UPDATE gk_conversations
SET
  status = '{{ $('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.conversationStage }}',
  decisor_name = CASE
    WHEN {{ $('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.extractedManagerName ? 'true' : 'false' }} = 'true'
    THEN '{{ ($('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.extractedManagerName).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    ELSE decisor_name
  END,
  decisor_phone = CASE
    WHEN {{ $('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.extractedManagerContact ? 'true' : 'false' }} = 'true'
    THEN '{{ ($('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.extractedManagerContact).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    ELSE decisor_phone
  END,
  decisor_email = CASE
    WHEN {{ $('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.extractedManagerEmail ? 'true' : 'false' }} = 'true'
    THEN '{{ ($('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.extractedManagerEmail).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    ELSE decisor_email
  END,
  contact_type = CASE
    WHEN {{ $('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.contactType ? 'true' : 'false' }} = 'true'
    THEN '{{ $('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.contactType }}'
    ELSE contact_type
  END,
  detected_persona = CASE
    WHEN {{ $('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.detectedPersona ? 'true' : 'false' }} = 'true'
      AND (detected_persona IS NULL OR detected_persona = 'menu_bot')
    THEN '{{ $('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.detectedPersona }}'
    ELSE detected_persona
  END,
  persona_confidence = CASE
    WHEN persona_confidence IS NULL AND {{ $('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.personaConfidence ? 'true' : 'false' }} = 'true'
    THEN '{{ $('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.personaConfidence }}'
    ELSE persona_confidence
  END
WHERE remote_jid = '{{ $('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.remoteJid }}';

-- Atualiza lead para failed quando conversa encerrada em negativa
UPDATE gk_leads
SET status = 'failed', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE conversation_id = (
  SELECT id FROM gk_conversations WHERE remote_jid = '{{ $('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.remoteJid }}' LIMIT 1
)
  AND '{{ $('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.conversationStage }}' = 'denied'
  AND status NOT IN ('decisor_captured', 'opted_out', 'closed', 'failed');

INSERT INTO gk_messages (conversation_id, direction, content, message_type, stage)
VALUES (
  (SELECT id FROM gk_conversations WHERE remote_jid = '{{ $('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.remoteJid }}' LIMIT 1),
  'outbound',
  '{{ ($('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.responseMessage).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  'text',
  '{{ $('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.rawStage }}'
);

INSERT INTO clinic_decisors (
  place_id,
  gk_conversation_id,
  clinic_name,
  clinic_phone,
  manager_name,
  manager_phone,
  manager_email,
  lead_score,
  ads_group,
  status
) VALUES (
  '{{ $('Supabase - Busca Conversa').first().json.place_id || '' }}',
  (SELECT id FROM gk_conversations WHERE remote_jid = '{{ $('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.remoteJid }}' LIMIT 1),
  '{{ ($('Merge - Contexto da Conversa').first().json.clinicName || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($('Merge - Contexto da Conversa').first().json.clinicPhone || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.extractedManagerName || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.extractedManagerContact || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($('Processa Resposta FastAPI').first().json.extractedManagerEmail || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $('Supabase - Busca Conversa').first().json.lead_score || 0 }},
  '{{ $('Supabase - Busca Conversa').first().json.ads_group || '' }}',
  'captured'
)
ON CONFLICT (manager_phone) WHERE manager_phone IS NOT NULL DO NOTHING;

SELECT direction, content, stage, created_at
FROM gk_messages
WHERE conversation_id = (SELECT id FROM gk_conversations WHERE remote_jid = '{{ $("Processa Resposta FastAPI").first().json.remoteJid }}' LIMIT 1)
ORDER BY created_at ASC;

INSERT INTO gk_discovered_cases (
  conversation_id,
  clinic_name,
  final_stage,
  quality_score,
  outcome_label,
  outcome_reason,
  sofia_did_well,
  sofia_should_improve,
  is_new_pattern,
  suggested_scenario_name,
  full_conversation,
  raw_glm_response,
  remote_jid
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.conversationId }}',
  '{{ ($json.clinicName).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.rawStage }}',
  {{ $json.qualityScore }},
  '{{ $json.outcomeLabel }}',
  '{{ ($json.outcomeReason).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.sofiaDidWell || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.sofiaShoulImprove || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.isNewPattern }},
  '{{ ($json.suggestedScenarioName).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.conversationText).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.rawGlmResponse).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.remoteJid }}'
);
SELECT environment, homolog_phone, sdr_name FROM sdr_config WHERE id = 1;

UPDATE gk_conversations
SET paused     = true,
    updated_at  = NOW()
WHERE remote_jid = '{{ $json.remoteJid }}'
  AND paused IS DISTINCT FROM true
RETURNING id, remote_jid, paused;
